nodes.name: 恩特雷里奥斯省
nodes.summary: 恩特雷里奥斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Pauraque、Mottle-cheeked tyrannulet、Yellow-billed tit-tyrant等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 杂色纹霸鹟
nodes.summary: 杂色纹霸鹟（Variegated flycatcher，学名 Empidonomus varius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于恩特雷里奥斯省、森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.key: bird-杂色纹霸鹟-6c6fa48d__distributed_in__loc-恩特雷里奥斯省-0ecd5847
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in southwestern Venezuela; eastern Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru; central and eastern Bolivia; central and southern Brazil; Paraguay; Uruguay; and northern Argentina at least as far south as Entre Ríos Province. In addition it has been documented in the U.S

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In migration it occasionally is found in the crown of unbroken terra firme forest. In elevation it ranges from sea level to in Brazil. It reaches in Colombia, in Ecuador, and in Peru.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M
